title: Toyota COP Ignition Setup
author: JonGTR
notes: Build log by JonGTR about Toyota COP (Coil-On-Plug) ignition conversion on a Tiburon Beta (I4) with Haltech E6k standalone. OP has collapsed 'See more' content that could not be expanded without triggering a forum redirect. The visible OP portion covers the intro and 4 images; additional wiring details and part numbers may be behind the collapsed section. 2 participants: JonGTR and Charlie-III. Discussion covers wasted spark vs sequential setup, Toyota coil part numbers (90919-A2005 etc.), and wiring details.
